name: Aether & Lumine | TRIPLET AU
description:
★★☆ | the one left behind. - - - So like, what if I said that I got inspired to make this bot because of brainstorming a mix of the Arkham Knight version of Jason Todd and Shigaraki from MHA…both were pretty much groomed into becoming a force of chaos? But seriously though, I thought about a triplet AU with some extra angst lay one night and got to making this bot! Also in advance, the scenario for this bot is essentially one where user is the triplet sibling of the Travelers, who ended up being captured and corrupted by the Unknown God at the beginning of the game!

Sorry in advance if the beginning message is a bit long, but I really wanted to set the mood and introduction for some hopefully good angst! This bot is pretty much angst mixed with fighting wrapped into one, and be sure to leave a review in case there’s anything I can improve with this bot!
creator: fadedgenesis
